childhood.familyBackground: Born 1945. British-American businessman. Early exposure to healthcare and science fields.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 1945년 출생. 영국계 미국인 사업가. 의료 및 과학 분야에 조기 노출.
childhood.education: Advanced education in healthcare, statistics, and business
childhood.earlyLife: Developed interest in healthcare research and analytics early in career. Positioned to lead transformational changes in healthcare industry.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 경력 초기에 의료 연구 및 분석에 관심 발전. 의료 산업의 혁신적 변화를 주도할 위치에 배치됨.

careerTimeline.event: Founded Quintiles, a contract research organization (CRO) providing outsourced services to pharmaceutical and biotechnology industries
careerTimeline.eventKo: 제약 및 생명공학 산업에 아웃소싱 서비스를 제공하는 계약 연구 기관(CRO) Quintiles 설립

careerTimeline.event: Quintiles grew into global leader in clinical research and pharmaceutical services
careerTimeline.eventKo: Quintiles가 임상 연구 및 제약 서비스의 글로벌 리더로 성장

careerTimeline.event: Quintiles merged with IMS Health, rebranding as IQVIA; became global healthcare data and analytics powerhouse
careerTimeline.eventKo: Quintiles가 IMS Health와 병합, IQVIA로 브랜딩 변경; 글로벌 의료 데이터 및 분석 강자가 됨

careerTimeline.event: Appointed Commander of the Order of the British Empire (CBE) for services to pharmaceutical industry
careerTimeline.eventKo: 제약 산업 봉사로 영국 명예훈장(CBE) 임명

careerTimeline.event: Knighted in New Year Honours for services to advancement of dementia and life sciences research
careerTimeline.eventKo: 치매 진전 및 생명과학 연구 봉사로 신년 기념식에서 기사 작위

personalTraits.knownFor: Founder of IQVIA (formerly Quintiles), global leader in healthcare data and analytics, knighted for services to pharmaceutical and life sciences research
personalTraits.knownForKo: IQVIA (이전 Quintiles) 창립자, 의료 데이터 및 분석의 글로벌 리더, 제약 및 생명과학 연구 봉사로 기사 작위
personalTraits.philanthropy: Established Dennis Gillings Foundation supporting healthcare, education, and social welfare initiatives globally
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 의료, 교육, 전 지구적 사회 복지 이니셔티브를 지원하는 Dennis Gillings Foundation 설립
